sources.title: Mistral AI Salaries | Levels.fyi
sources.note: Highest reported Solution Architect package at Mistral is $326,625 TC (common-range average, no level breakdown) — a data point for the generic SA title only, not a consulting variant.

sources.title: OpenAI Solution Architect Salary | Levels.fyi
sources.note: Same $418K L4 median used for vendor-side; no consulting-specific SA data exists to justify this archetype's lower numbers independently.
